summary: Tested Earnings Hold Period System and Live Driver Tracking features for Trend Syria. All backend APIs working (11/11 tests passed). Frontend UI tested - Admin settings panel shows hold settings, Wallet page shows held balance indicator.

update_hold_settings_api.details: Successfully updates hold settings with validation. Returns updated settings.

held_earnings_summary_api.details: Returns total_held, count, food_held, products_held (all 0 currently as no new orders with hold)

user_held_earnings_api.details: Returns held_earnings list, total_held, count for delivery/seller users

hold_settings_public_api.details: Public endpoint to get hold period settings

manual_release_api.details: Admin can manually release all held earnings

driver_location_update_api.details: Updates driver location with latitude, longitude, speed, heading

admin_delivery_settings_ui.details: Earnings Hold section visible with toggle, food_hold_hours, products_hold_hours inputs, and summary display

wallet_page_held_balance.details: Wallet page shows '⏳ قيد التأكيد' (Pending confirmation) indicator for held balance

driver_location_tracker_hook.details: Location updates every 10 seconds (interval set to 10000ms)

priority_popup_fix.details: Uses useRef for rejectedOrderIds to prevent repeated popup showing for same order

critical_code_review_comments: Earnings Hold system correctly implemented with background task for auto-release every 5 minutes
Driver location tracking correctly set to 10 seconds interval
Priority popup fix uses useRef to track rejected orders - prevents repeated popups
Wallet page correctly displays held_balance as 'قيد التأكيد' indicator
All APIs have proper admin authorization checks (403 for non-admin)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Held earnings = 0 because no new orders created after feature activation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Earnings Hold Period system fully implemented and tested. All APIs working. Current held earnings = 0 because system just activated and no new completed orders. Food seller credentials (0988888888) not working - may need to verify in database. Driver location tracking set to 10 seconds.
implementation_notes: Hold settings stored in MongoDB settings collection with type='earnings_hold'
Background task (release_held_earnings) runs every 5 minutes to auto-release matured earnings
held_balance field added to wallets collection
Driver tracking interval changed from 30s to 10s for live tracking
OrdersMap.js uses useRef for rejectedOrderIds to prevent closure issues in interval callbacks
